# Qymo

> Qymo is a Nigerian product studio that designs, builds and ships software solutions. Qymo is the studio behind Haja, a marketplace for local stores, services and nearby used deals.

## About

Qymo is a solutions studio (product studio) based in Nigeria. Instead of only advising, Qymo takes ideas from concept to a working, launched product. Its flagship product is Haja (https://haja.shop), a live Nigerian marketplace built and operated by Qymo.

Contact: hello@qymo.ng
Website: https://qymo.ng

## What Qymo builds

- Web and marketplace platforms (multi-vendor storefronts, dashboards)
- Mobile apps
- Product and UX design, design systems
- Payments and third-party integrations (payments, maps, logistics)
- Backend, APIs and infrastructure built to scale
- Launch and iteration

## Flagship product: Haja

- URL: https://haja.shop
- What it is: a Nigerian marketplace where people buy from local stores, find services, and discover nearby used deals.
- Built and run by Qymo.

## Key facts

- Name: Qymo
- Type: product / solutions studio
- Country: Nigeria
- Flagship product: Haja (haja.shop)
- Contact: hello@qymo.ng

## Links

- Homepage: https://qymo.ng
- Haja (flagship product): https://haja.shop
